'''Tervissis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tervissis system/Legends|Tervissis system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of two [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Tervig]]s and the [[Bandie]]s. The two species were at war with one another, with the Tervigs subjugating the Bandies.

==History==
In the aftermath of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Tervissis resisted the control of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], and was counted among what were known as the [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]]. Circa [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began the [[Listehol Campaign]], an offensive against former Separatists, [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], and [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]]. The Imperial forces were led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bannidge Holt]]. Though the Imperials were victorious on all other fronts, and made continuous [[Raids on Tervissis|assaults]] against Tervissis, they continued to resist Imperial control. It wasn't until [[13 BBY/Legends|five years later]] that the Empire finally [[Invasion of Tervissis|conquered]] the planet.<ref name="TEGtW" />
